Embracing a Personal Aesthetic:.sample: My preference leans towards a vintage look, akin to old cameras or classic video games. The Art of Negative Prompting:.sample: Negative prompts are vital. They're not just about avoiding unwanted elements but about sharpening the focus on your desired theme. For a black and white scene, I'd counterbalance with vibrant colors in the negative prompts to enhance the monochromatic effect.

Experimenting with Settings:.sample: When working with a new model or prompt, I begin with three short test runs, each lasting 15-30 seconds, across the basic settings.
